privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real Amazon product: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones (ASIN B09XS7JWHH). The expected product URL (https://www.amazon.com/dp/B09XS7JWHH) is verified as correct. The product specifications mentioned in the task description are accurate: the headphones feature 8 microphones controlled by 2 processors, 30-hour battery life, Auto NC Optimizer, and multipoint connection capability. The expected price of $348.00 is within the range of current market prices (which vary from approximately $222.99 to $328+ depending on sales, though MSRP is around $399). The product name in metadata is a shortened version of the full Amazon title but correctly identifies the product.
